subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! Unto Thee be praise and unto Thee be glory, unto Thee be grandeur and unto Thee be radiance. Verily, I am Thy servant and the son of Thy servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی لک الحمد و لک الثناء و لک العظمه و لک البهاء انی عبدک و ابن عبدک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
